headline: Scotiabank Cuts Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Target, Sees Limited Near-Term Catalysts
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) is included among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy Now for Passive Income. Top 100 Places Where the Rich People Own Real Estate On March 4, Scotiabank lowered its price recommendation on Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) to $140 from $142. It reiterated a Sector Perform rating on the shares. […]

headline: Why Is Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Up 2.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Pricing Look Attractive After A 15.9% One-Year Share Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) looks attractively priced at around US$134.41 per share, you are not alone. This article is here to help you weigh what that number might really mean. MAA's share price has been relatively mixed recently, with a 1.1% decline over the last 7 days, a 1.7% gain over the past 30 days, a 3.4% decline year to date, and a 15.9% decline over the last year. These moves may have changed how investors view both its growth potential...

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $138
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $144 to $138.
